meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.emptyHint: Start the system by sending a PDF via email or the webhook endpoint.
detail.noSegments: Select a speaker to view their contributions.
detail.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about this meeting…
detail.chatError: The question could not be processed.
detail.selectSpeaker: Select a speaker on the left.
subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.lead: Receive a summary in your language for every new meeting.
subscriptions.preview.title: Your first briefing
subscriptions.preview.body: Once a new meeting is processed, you will receive a summary with decisions, votes, and what it means for your neighbourhood.
about.title: AI020
about.lead: AI020 makes council meetings readable for residents — with clear summaries, vote results, and what each decision means for the neighbourhood.
about.body: AI020 makes council meetings readable for residents with clear summaries, vote results, and local impact.
about.step1.title: Submit PDF
about.step1.desc: Send the meeting minutes PDF to the inbound address or upload directly via the system.
about.step2.title: Auto-processing
about.step2.desc: The system extracts text, identifies speakers, and detects agenda items and votes.
about.step3.title: AI Summary
about.step3.desc: GPT-4o writes a structured summary in plain Dutch (B1 level).
about.step4.title: Reaches Residents
about.step4.desc: Subscribers receive the summary in their own language — via the platform or by email.
admin.title: Admin
